'''Girov Dza'tey''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] operative trained in the martial arts of [[Jeswandi]].

Some months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he led a Bothan intelligence mission to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Malrev IV]]. The expedition ship, the ''[[Starfaring]]'', crashed on Malrev's surface, prompting [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] to mount a rescue [[Malrev incident|mission]].

[[File:GirovDzatey2-XWingRogueSquadron19.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Girov Dza'tey]]
Meanwhile, Girov discovered the power of [[Sith sorcery/Legends|Sith magic]] suffusing the planet, emanating from an ancient [[Sith temple/Legends|Sith Temple]] site controlled by [[Cartariun]]. Girov used his own men and the Rogues as a diversion while he infiltrated the temple. Inside, he confronted Cartariun and his Rogue Squadron prisoner, [[Dllr Nep]], gaining control over the Sith magic and using it to kill the former and imprison the latter. He then launched an attack on his former comrades, using [[Irrukiine]] in [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptors]], but was defeated, thanks to the intervention of [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo|Plourr Ilo]] and an [[Eiattu 6]] fighter squadron. He died when Dllr and fellow Rogue [[Herian I'ngre]] sacrificed themselves to blow up the Sith temple.
